title: Verify no accidental charges occur with Reminder toggle active
description: Security test ensuring the reminder feature does not auto-charge user
preconditions: User has active trial with Remind Me enabled

steps.description: 2. Wait for notification trigger (or simulate 24h before trial end)
4. Verify user can still cancel after notification

expected_result: No charges are processed; notification simply reminds user to decide, user retains full cancellation ability
